listing.title: ChatGPT - Your Daily Stoic
listing.description: 🧘🏽‍♂️✒️ Your guide and assistant for Stoic intentions, reflections, meditations and journaling. Combining the wisdom of both ancient and recent philosophers like Marcus Aurelius, Seneca, Epictetus, Hector, Rufus, Plato, Aristotle, Alan Watts and others ✒️🧘🏽‍♂️
